data.title: Consistency
data.description: Provides a uniform experience across various Apple devices and platforms.
data.technical_spec: Unified design language and interaction patterns.

data.title: Feedback
data.description: Immediate feedback for user actions improves engagement and satisfaction.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes tactile, visual, and auditory feedback systems.

data.title: Simplicity
data.description: Coherent and minimalistic design aids user comprehension and navigation.
data.technical_spec: Employs a clear typographic hierarchy and ample white space.

data.title: Accessibility
data.description: Ensures inclusive design accommodating users of all abilities.
data.technical_spec: Supports alternative input methods and screen reader capabilities.

data.title: Affordance
data.description: Design elements intuitively indicate their functionalities and operations.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes icons and controls that encourage interaction.
